title: Is 1view disabled on Monday.com?
excerpt: Wondering if anyone here has used 1view to create a shared workspace? I came from this discussion Cross-cutting Workspaces, mirroring Boards but when I clicked on the 1view link, it brought me to 404 error.

posts.author: EmilyGoh (Emily Goh-Marchese)
posts.cookedHtml: Wondering if anyone here has used 1view to create a shared workspace? I came from this discussion Cross-cutting Workspaces, mirroring Boards but when I clicked on the 1view link, it brought me to 404 error.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
With the deployment of the App Marketplace things changed up.

Here is the marketplace link:
https://monday.com/marketplace/20

The app’s webpage is 1View
